notableMoments: Hosted the 2022 World Cup - first Middle Eastern country to do so
Qualified as hosts for their first-ever World Cup appearance in 2022
Lost all three group matches (Ecuador 0-2, Senegal 1-3, Netherlands 0-2)
First host nation to lose the opening match of a World Cup
Won the 2019 Asian Cup to prove their rising footballing credentials
2026 marks their first qualification on sporting merit
